description_long: This object features a thick, rounded ring structure at the top, with a smooth, continuous surface that transitions into a bulbous, elongated handle below. The exterior is covered in a vibrant, marbled pattern of purples, blues, and oranges, giving it a modern and eye-catching appearance. A circular button or sensor is visible on the side of the handle, suggesting an interactive electronic function. The interior of the ring is hollow, and the handle appears ergonomically shaped for gripping. The object lacks any visible display screen or branding, and its design is reminiscent of a handheld electronic controller or sensor device. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of plastic, with possible internal electronic components.
description: A colorful, marbled handheld electronic device with a thick ring and ergonomic handle, featuring a side button or sensor.
description_view_0: The thick ring and bulbous handle are prominent, with the marbled pattern and a hint of the side button visible.
description_view_1: The hollow interior of the ring is clearly visible, and the side button or sensor is more pronounced.
description_view_2: The side button or sensor is fully visible, and the ergonomic curve of the handle is evident.
description_view_3: The back of the handle and the continuous marbled pattern are visible, with less emphasis on the interactive parts.
